# Third-party notices for `.github/instructions/`

The following instruction files in this directory are imported (verbatim or
lightly trimmed for repo fit) from the [`github/awesome-copilot`](https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot)
repository, which is distributed under the MIT License:

- `agent-skills.instructions.md`
- `agents.instructions.md`
- `hooks.instructions.md`
- `instructions.instructions.md`
- `rust.instructions.md`

The original MIT License notice from `github/awesome-copilot` is reproduced
below in full, as required by its terms.

Project-specific instruction files in this directory (e.g.
`rust-wta.instructions.md`, `rust-localization.instructions.md`,
`localization.instructions.md`) are original to this repository and are
covered by the top-level repository license.
